title: Standard Chartered sticks to $2T stablecoin call but trims T-bill impact

title: Bank of Korea renews call for bank-led won stablecoins as bill stalls
message_html: Bank of Korea renews call for bank-led won stablecoins as bill stalls ...
snippet: The Bank of Korea proposed a bank-led consortium and a statutory interagency body for issuer approvals, citing the US GENIUS Act as a model, according to local media.

title: US lender Rate unveils mortgage program recognizing crypto holdings
message_html: US lender Rate unveils mortgage program recognizing crypto holdings ...
snippet: The nationwide RateFi product allows borrowers to count crypto holdings toward mortgage underwriting requirements without selling their assets.
